# ANALYSIS: ORB_DIRECTION_FILTER

**Filed:** 2026-05-21
**Filer:** chef-nemotron
**Type:** watcher quality gate (long-only)
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-MORE-DATA)

## Week Plan (priority: highest)

Goal: Obtain 3 live J-confirmed wins on long-only ORB entries.

Steps:
1. Engine currently takes both long and short ORB signals. Need to add a filter in heartbeat.md to only allow long ORB entries when ORB_DIRECTION_FILTER = "long".
   - Simple implementation: in ORB entry logic, check if `ORB_DIRECTION_FILTER == "long"` and `signal.direction == "long"`; else skip.
   - This is a one-line guard; no new feature-add.
2. After implementing, run gym validation to ensure no regression on existing tests (should pass).
3. Deploy to paper/live ( Alpaca paper) and monitor for ORB long signals.
4. Aim to capture at least 3 live wins on J's anchor days (4/29,5/01,5/04) or other days; J will confirm wins.
5. Track wins in journal; once 3 J-confirmed wins are logged, submit candidate for ratification.

## OP-20 disclosures

1. Account-size assumption: same as above.
2. Sample bias: based on 274 graded ORB observations; long-only N=274, WR=70.4%, +$7,378; risk if short ORB become profitable in future.
3. Out-of-sample: NEEDS-OOS (will validate via live paper trades).
4. Real-fills: NEEDS-REAL-FILLS (need to verify top 3 J days with realistic simulator).
5. Failure modes: worst day if a short ORB winner is missed (but engine currently loses on shorts; skipping may reduce losses). Max drawdown from missed long ORB losers? Actually we only take longs, so we may incur losses on long ORB losers; need to ensure they are small.
6. Concentration: top-5 days likely high; will disclose after live.

## Confidence

7/10 -- engine change trivial; main work is live validation and win collection.
